reviews.review_description: So me and my daughter was finally able to get into the server where we could play together. About 4 days ago we went to play in multiplayer, and it refuses to connect. I even tried uninstalling and reinstalling the game, and still broken. For 4 days now. I want my money back.
Best game on vr but now it stopped working so it’s not worth getting this game anymore unless the devs fix the server. Devs please fix the server
The aesthetic of not knowing what is we're is sooooo good would recommend I'm in chapter 7 and not nearly half way though all so the fact that notes reveal the hidden lore is sooooooo fun.

reviews.review_title: Decent game just dont mind the jank
reviews.review_description:
This game has a really good story and decent graphics for the time it was released. Other than some janky controls (why cant i open my backpack when holding a rifle but can holding anything else?) And a few bugs (backpack items disappearing leaving you in the dark 🤬) its actually quite fun and decent full length campaign.

If you can look past its few issues youll find a good game hidden here. I personally recommend it, but obviously cant give more than 3 stars just due to the bugs

I bought this game and feel I was cheated.  There is a switch in the sewer level that has a bug that prevents me from flipping it.  I am unable to progress.  It is right after you climb over the water after raising the load on the forklift.  I went back to play now after months, and the switch is still stuck. Can I get a patch or something?  I can't progress.  So far, I regret having bought this game.

reviews.review_title: Not bad, but has overlooked mechanics.
reviews.review_description: While the game has interesting story, and quite a good workout with its running mechanic. Especially if wearing wrist weights. I do not understand who wrote the jet sky mechanic in this game. The thing barely turns at full turn input, and yet even if it touches a wall - it turns around 180 degrees. In turns it behaves as a motorcycle, not a jet ski. This is pretty annoying. Also on jet ski VR kit easily loses track of hand position, and can start turning left instead of right for example. This is especially frustrating. I hope devs patch this at some point.

reviews.review_title: Top five Top five best games I’ve played
reviews.review_description:
￼￼ this game is the best post apocalyptic game I’ve ever played playing with my brother and sometimes by myself although it was very long we had fun as far as update go.
I would like better graphic ￼update.(no shade) ￼
It has a very good atmosphere and the audio quality simply cannot be beaten. All I would ask is a graphics improvement and maybe more settings options to accommodate the running controls.

reviews.review_title: Make cross platform with pc again
reviews.review_description:
This game is amazing but pc is on 3.0.5 and quest is on 3.0.6 and so can’t cross play
 with my fiend

When I first played this game I was terrified especially at level 3 going dark but this game is honestly one of the best vr horror and best vr experiences in general I’ve ever played ranging from the story to the immersive and even to the suspense of what’s gonna happen next i just love this game

reviews.review_title: PLEASE HELP MY CO OP GAME QUIT WORKING
reviews.review_description: CO OP and single  player will not load it just says lobby's loading please help I loved this game but now I can't even play it

developer_response.body:
Hello,
We're very sorry for the inconvenience you experienced. The issue was due to a temporary domain outage, which has now been resolved. The game, including Co-op and Single Player modes, should be fully accessible again. Thank you for your patience and understanding!

Me and my buddy having the same issue. Game won‘t start. After Project Terminus VR Screen it says : you must take off your vr headset to continue. After that nothing. If you take the Headset off, game crashes!

We both are playing on Oculus Quest 2.
Ist Looks like the game thinks we are playing on pc or something.

We reportet this in the Steam section under bug reports but no one answered.

I‘ll change the rating after we get some info from the developers:)

Only game I have that gives me motion sickness and I play RE4 and the walking dead but besides that my friend said to get it to play with him and it just isn’t as fun as I thought it is cool for multiplayer aspects but other than that it’s very eh, whenever you hit a zombie they have no reaction and the weapon goes through them and if you don’t move out of the way they will walk inside you and can hit you so you have to move to see them and hit them again

developer_response.body:
Hello RecluisveGamer,

So sorry about this, we have made numerous game fixes and I hope you could hop in the game again at some point.

If you feel like you have more suggestions or feedback, you may also join us on Discord: https://discord.gg/pYEUY5nHVE
